changes: Implementation plan activated: PLAN-INGEST-V1 contains 25 zero-context tasks across 5 sub-plans and 60 compile dependencies. The sequence begins with the active LEDGER public-contract prerequisite and an ignored private-fixture evidence gate, then delivers two qualified PdfPig adapters, passive preview/review, candidate-granular commit/recovery, public/security/use-case gates, and a final module gate. All 31 accepted design path patterns are owned; 20 test intents are linked; every task context fits the 2,500-token execution budget; no beads were compiled.
